summary: Retried the TestFlight proof gate after the user installed a fresh TestFlight build on the paired iPhone, then preserved Build Info screenshots. The installed Owlory app reports bundleVersion 20260417081912 and Build Info shows clean Release commit d0513a41a3e438a76494f43e5f4094a6983ad75e, but that stamped commit's committed project.pbxproj still has CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION 20260417081904. The gate stopped before Continue capture.
validations_passed: xcrun devicectl device info apps --device 691FB5B7-A8F2-5AE4-BE95-EC1CABC5872F --bundle-id com.raelldottin.owlory --json-output /tmp/owlory-device-apps-fresh.json

contract_status_changes.before: The user reported a fresh clean TestFlight build was installed on the paired iPhone.
contract_status_changes.after: The installed app is newer than the prior failed retry, and Build Info confirms clean Release commit d0513a41a3e438a76494f43e5f4094a6983ad75e. It is still not reproducible from committed source because that commit's project.pbxproj has CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION 20260417081904 while the TestFlight bundle reports 20260417081912.

residual_risks: The installed TestFlight app may have been built from a local-only Xcode build-number bump or other release process not represented in Git.
No natural-data Continue surface was exercised.
TestFlight proof remains blocked until the uploaded bundle version matches committed source and Build Info shows clean matching commit/build/GitStatus.
recommended_next_reason: Retry only after creating/uploading/installing a TestFlight build whose bundle version matches committed project.pbxproj CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION.
